hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "📋 Doc maintenance checklist — review before ending session:
  1. docs/decisions/ — did a structural decision get made? Write/update an ADR and its README row
  2. docs/plans/*.md — mark completed steps as done (- [x]); update the plans README status
  3. README.md "What this manages" — reflect any new resource type or module
  4. CLAUDE.md — update "Active work" if status changed"}'
